cc:Work.dc:source: vpype eval 'files=sorted(glob('"'"'D:/Code/PenPlot/Draw App/MC - SVG shuffler/drawing_tiles/t*.svg'"'"'))' grid -o 110.827 235.827 4 4 read --no-fail '%files[_i] if _i < len(files) else '"'"''"'"'%' rect 0 0 91.9291 216.929 end layout --fit-to-margins 1cm 500x1000 lmove all new splitall linemerge linesort write 'D:\Code\PenPlot\Draw App\MC - SVG shuffler\drawing_4x4_500x1000_mosaic.svg'
